name: wiki-knowledge-compiler
description: Karpathy-style local-first LLM Wiki / Knowledge Compiler for Claude Code. Ingest sources, build a structured markdown knowledge base, and maintain it with AI-powered workflows.

wiki-setup.description: Set up your wiki — choose your project size and get started

wiki-ingest.description: Add a document to your wiki

wiki-query.description: Ask a question — get an answer from your wiki with sources

wiki-insights.description: Discover connections and patterns across your sources

wiki-health.description: Find and fix problems in your wiki

wiki-update.description: Refresh your wiki's table of contents and indexes
